title: Mine Origins [BND]
description:
Greetings to all, this is my first modpack.
Suitable for server and single player games.
body:
Greetings to all, this is my first modpack.
Suitable for server and single player games.
You are free to do anything, new generation, new loot, modified nether, modified end.
The coolest thing is the Staff and magic, Spell Books and Runes.
New animals, voice chat, emotions, mob animations.

2 handwritten mods have been added as DLC content.

Download and play for fun!
